temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A young, blonde-haired boy with a distressed and fearful expression is shown in a close-up. His face is sweaty, and he is crying as he looks down, clutching something out of frame. He is wearing a grey sweatshirt. (Storyline: The scene opens on a moment of intense distress, establishing the boy's fear and sadness without providing context.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Panicked, distressed, and sobbing. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:04-00:07) The boy's distress escalates as he continues to cry. He raises a small, dark-colored object, possibly a toy or a piece of a toy, and bangs it against his head in a frantic, repetitive motion. His face is contorted in anguish. (Storyline: The boy's actions become more violent and erratic, showing a peak in his panic and desperation as he seems to be trying to force something to happen or to escape a situation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Desperate and hysterical. 2) Background sounds or music: The sound of the object banging against his head is audible.)
